sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الطَّبِيعَةَ أَجْمَلُ مَكَانٍ لِلرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da je priroda najljepše mjesto za odmor.
sentences.translationEn: I think that nature is the most beautiful place to rest.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَجْلِسُ بَيْنَ الْأَشْجَارِ أَشْعُرُ بِالسَّكِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada sjedim između drveća, osjećam mir.
sentences.translationEn: When I sit among the trees I feel tranquil.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ الذَّهَابَ إِلَى الْجَبَلِ أَوِ الْبَحْرِ فِي الْعُطْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volim ići na planinu ili more tokom odmora.
sentences.translationEn: I like going to the mountain or the sea during the holiday.

sentences.translation: Priroda nam vraća energiju i sreću.
sentences.translationEn: Nature restores our energy and happiness.
